# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because the source is a research preprint with explicit empirical evaluation.

## Why

The excerpt is a formal arXiv manuscript and reports measured results across named benchmarks including GAIA, BrowseComp, and Humanity's Last Exam, with claimed accuracy gains up to 20% over baselines. That meets the institute bar for real experimental evidence.

## Limits
